name: gitnexus-vscode
description: Inline GitNexus health metrics for the file you're editing. Talks to a local gitnexus deployment (http://localhost:4173 by default).

gitnexus.serverUrl.description: Base URL of the gitnexus-web deployment. Must expose /api/repos and /ownership.

gitnexus.statusBarMetric.description: Which per-file metric to surface in the status bar.

commands.title: GitNexus: Refresh metrics for active file
